reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención el personal de playa. El Domingo 18/2 por la tarde, el muchacho que atendía Serviclub ,muy mala predisposición,  y no quiso cobrarme con la app.

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff were very helpful. However, on Sunday afternoon, February 18th, the young man working at Serviclub was very unhelpful and refused to process my payment through the app.
